title: S + V + V-ing（動名詞作受詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 享受/完成/避免/介意/考慮 + 動名詞
主詞 + 建議/保持/練習/放棄/否認 + 動名詞

explanation: 此句型使用特定動詞後接動名詞（V-ing形式）作為受詞。這些動詞包括享受、完成、迴避、介意、考慮、建議、保持、練習、放棄、否認等。動名詞表示已完成或進行中的動作。注意不能在這些動詞後直接接不定詞（to V）；例如應說「enjoy doing」而非「enjoy to do」。此句型強調對動作本身的態度或過程。

examples.eng: I really enjoy playing basketball with my friends after school.
examples.chi: 我真的很享受放學後與朋友一起打籃球。

examples.eng: She finished writing her essay before the deadline yesterday.
examples.chi: 她昨天在截止期限前完成了她的論文寫作。

examples.eng: We should avoid eating too much junk food for our health.
examples.chi: 為了健康，我們應該避免吃太多垃圾食物。

examples.eng: Have you considered studying abroad for your future career?
examples.chi: 你考慮過為了未來職業而出國念書嗎？

extension.tip: 判斷重點：這類動詞後必須接動名詞（V-ing），不能接不定詞（to V）。可用「動作性質強調」來判斷—這些動詞強調對動作過程或事實本身的態度，而非未來計畫或目標。常見錯誤是將其與「want/plan/hope + to V」混淆。

examples.result: → ✓ I enjoy reading books.（動詞enjoyenjoy只接V-ing，表示享受閱讀這個動作）

examples.test: ❌ She denied to take the money.
examples.result: → ✓ She denied taking the money.（deny表示否認該動作已發生，須用V-ing）

examples.test: ❌ We should avoid to make mistakes.
examples.result: → ✓ We should avoid making mistakes.（avoid表示迴避某動作，須用V-ing）

extension.note: 記憶口訣：享完避介考建保練放否 → 這些動詞後一律接V-ing，不接to V。

parts: the window? It's too hot in here.
exercises.sentence: Do you mind opening the window? It's too hot in here.
exercises.translation: 你介意打開窗戶嗎？這裡太熱了。

parts: my homework, so I can go out now.
exercises.sentence: I have finished doing my homework, so I can go out now.
exercises.translation: 我已經完成做功課了，所以我現在可以出去了。

parts: English every day to improve our speaking skills.
exercises.sentence: We should practice speaking English every day to improve our speaking skills.
exercises.translation: 我們應該每天練習說英語以改進我們的口說技巧。

exercises.sentence: She suggested watching a movie tonight instead of staying at home.
exercises.translation: 她建議今晚看電影，而不是待在家裡。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的動詞形式完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: My father enjoys _______ golf on weekends with his friends.
mc_exercises.explanation: enjoy後接動名詞(V-ing)作受詞，故答案是playing。A項play為原形動詞，C項to play為不定詞，D項plays為第三人稱單數，均不符合enjoy的用法規則。

mc_exercises.question_eng: The students finished _______ their homework by 8 PM yesterday.
mc_exercises.explanation: finish後接動名詞completing，表示已完成的動作。A項不定詞、C項原形動詞、D項過去式均不符finish的搭配規則。只有動名詞能作finish的受詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式完成句子，表達建議
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher suggested _______ more attention to pronunciation during English class.
mc_exercises.explanation: suggest後接動名詞paying作受詞。B項不定詞to pay雖在suggest後有特殊用法，但此處paying為標準搭配。C項原形、D項過去式均不符。動名詞paying最符合此句型的用法規範。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句意選擇正確的動詞形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: The suspect denied _______ at the crime scene at that time, but the witness insisted he was there.
mc_exercises.explanation: deny後接動名詞being作受詞，此處being在犯罪現場表進行中的狀態。B項不定詞to be不符deny的搭配；C項原形be無法表達被動或進行意義；D項was為過去式動詞，無法作deny的受詞。只有being能正確表達「被指控在現場」的含義。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我很享受和朋友一起打籃球。
translation_exercises.answer: I enjoy playing basketball with my friends.
hints: 提示1：使用 enjoy 後須接動名詞 V-ing 形式作受詞
提示2：避免寫成『enjoy to play』，這是常見錯誤

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她建議我們多練習英文會話以提高口說能力。
translation_exercises.answer: She suggested practicing English conversation to improve our speaking skills.
hints: 提示1：suggest 後接動名詞，不能用『suggest to do』；可在後面用不定詞表示目的
提示2：注意 suggested 後面直接跟 V-ing，中間不加代詞 we

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他們否認曾經洩露任何機密資訊給競爭對手。
translation_exercises.answer: They denied leaking any confidential information to their competitors.
hints: 提示1：deny 後接動名詞作受詞，表示否認某個動作或事實
提示2：常見錯誤是寫『deny to leak』或『deny leak』；must用 V-ing 形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管面臨許多困難，她仍然堅持追求自己的夢想，並避免被他人的批評所影響。
translation_exercises.answer: Despite facing many difficulties, she keeps pursuing her dreams and avoids being affected by others' criticism.
key_points: avoids being affected（動名詞的被動形式）
hints: 提示1：keep 和 avoid 都後接 V-ing；when subject changes, use object pronoun + V-ing (being affected)
提示2：注意『avoid being affected』是動名詞的被動形式，不是『avoid to be affected』
